#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
import sys
import requests
from datetime import datetime

# Get input data
input_data = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
keywords = input_data.get('keywords', '').split(',')
companies = input_data.get('companies', '').split(',')
location = input_data.get('location', 'India')

# Mock job search (replace with actual API calls)
jobs = []

for company in companies[:3]:  # Limit to 3 companies for demo
    for keyword in keywords[:2]:  # Limit to 2 keywords per company
        job = {
            'company': company.strip(),
            'title': f'{keyword.strip().title()} Specialist',
            'location': location,
            'posted_date': datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
            'description': f'Seeking experienced {keyword.strip()} professional for {company.strip()}',
            'application_url': f'https://{company.strip().lower().replace(" ", "").replace("\'", "")}.com/careers',
            'match_score': 85,
            'requirements': ['Python', 'Data Analysis', 'Biotechnology Background']
        }
        jobs.append(job)

result = {
    'total_jobs': len(jobs),
    'jobs': jobs,
    'search_timestamp': datetime.now().isoformat(),
    'search_criteria': {
        'keywords': keywords,
        'companies': companies,
        'location': location
    },
    'status': 'completed'
}

print(json.dumps(result))

#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
import sys

# Get job data
input_data = json.loads(sys.argv[1])
jobs = input_data.get('jobs', [])

# Generate application message template
template = """
Subject: Application for {title} Position at {company}

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the {title} position at {company}. With my background in Biotechnology and expertise in Python, data analysis, and bioinformatics, I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to your team.

Key qualifications:
• Diploma in Biotechnology with hands-on experience in bioinformatics
• Proficient in Python, SQL, and data analysis tools
• Experience with gene expression analysis and clinical data
• Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

I have attached my resume and portfolio for your review. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills can contribute to {company}'s research and development goals.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]
[Portfolio URL]
"""

# Generate messages for each job
messages = []
for job in jobs:
    message = template.format(
        title=job['title'],
        company=job['company']
    )
    messages.append({
        'company': job['company'],
        'title': job['title'],
        'message': message,
        'application_url': job['application_url']
    })

result = {
    'generated_messages': len(messages),
    'messages': messages,
    'status': 'completed'
}

print(json.dumps(result))
